en.extract:
The masked lark (Spizocorys personata) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae. It is found in Ethiopia and Kenya. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry shrubland and subtropical or tropical dry lowland grassland.


Taxonomy and systematics
Some authorities have placed the masked lark in the genus Calandrella.


Subspecies
Four subspecies are recognized: 

S. p. personata - Sharpe, 1895: Found in eastern Ethiopia
S. p. yavelloensis - (Benson, 1947): Found in southern Ethiopia and northern Kenya
S. p. mcchesneyi - (Williams, JG, 1957): Found on the Marsabit Plateau (northern Kenya)
S. p. intensa - (Rothschild, 1931): Found in central Kenya


References

The '''masked lark''' ('''''Spizocorys personata''''') is a species of [[lark]] in the family [[Alaudidae]]. It is found in Ethiopia and Kenya. Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical dry [[shrubland]] and subtropical or tropical dry lowland [[grassland]].

==Taxonomy and systematics==
Some authorities have placed the masked lark in the genus ''[[Calandrella]]''.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://avibase.bsc-eoc.org/species.jsp?avibaseid=419AEB97D5AD0CDB|title=Spizocorys personata - Avibase|website=avibase.bsc-eoc.org|access-date=2016-12-04}}</ref>

===Subspecies===
Four [[subspecies]] are recognized:<ref>{{Cite journal|title=IOC World Bird List 6.4|url=http://www.worldbirdnames.org/ioc-lists/crossref|journal=IOC World Bird List Datasets|doi=10.14344/ioc.ml.6.4|doi-access=free}}</ref> 
* ''S. p. personata'' - <small>[[Richard Bowdler Sharpe|Sharpe]], 1895</small>: Found in eastern Ethiopia
* ''S. p. yavelloensis'' - <small>([[Constantine Walter Benson|Benson]], 1947)</small>: Found in southern Ethiopia and northern Kenya
* ''S. p. mcchesneyi'' - <small>([[John George Williams|Williams, JG]], 1957)</small>: Found on the [[Marsabit]] Plateau (northern Kenya)
* ''S. p. intensa'' - <small>([[Walter Rothschild, 2nd Baron Rothschild|Rothschild]], 1931)</small>: Found in central Kenya

zh.extract:
花脸沙百灵（学名：Spizocorys personata），是百灵科沙百灵属的一种，是游猎迁徙的候鸟，分布于肯尼亚和埃塞俄比亚。全球活动范围约为150,000平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。
花脸沙百灵的平均体重约为19.9克。栖息地为亚热带或热带的（低地）干草原。


参考文献
